zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Bigod de Felbrigge於1372年出生在英國諾福爾可費爾布利格時，他的父親George Felbrigg27歲，母親Margaret Margery de Aspale16歲。他於1390年與Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE在英國諾福爾可費爾布利格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年12月3日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Bigod de Felbrigge于1372年出生在英国諾福爾可費爾布利格时，他的父亲George Felbrigg27岁，母亲Margaret Margery de Aspale16岁。他于1390年与Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE在英国諾福爾可費爾布利格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年12月3日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Bigod de Felbrigge was born in 1372, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, his father, George Felbrigg, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Margery de Aspale, was 16. He married Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE in 1390, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 3 December 1442, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Bigod de Felbrigge est né en 1372, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, George Felbrigg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Margery de Aspale, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE en 1390, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1442, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Bigod de Felbrigge 1372 in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Felbrigg 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Margery de Aspale 16. Er hat 1390 in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1442 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Bigod de Felbrigge è nato il nel 1372 nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, George Felbrigg, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Margery de Aspale, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE nel 1390, nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1442, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Bigod de Felbriggeが1372年にイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググで生まれた時，父George Felbriggは27歳，母Margaret Margery de Aspaleは16歳であった。1390年にイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググでMarketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年12月3日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Bigod de Felbrigge(이)가 1372년 영국 노르폴크 프브리그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Felbrigg(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Margery de Aspale(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 노르폴크 프브리그에서 Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 12월 3일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

mn.Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingd: Felbrigg, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Bigod de Felbrigge nasceu em 1372, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Felbrigg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Margery de Aspale, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE em 1390, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1442, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Bigod de Felbrigge родился в 1372 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени George Felbrigg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Margery de Aspale, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE в 1390 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 декабря 1442 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Bigod de Felbrigge nació en 1372, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, George Felbrigg, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Margery de Aspale, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Marketa (PIAST) DE FELBRIGGE en 1390, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1442, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
